news.title: Lupin's global CRDMO division is expanding its Dabhasa facility in Gujarat.
news.summary: Lupin's global CRDMO division is expanding its Dabhasa facility in Gujarat.

news.title:
Lupin expands Dabhasa unit, adding peptide and complex drug capabilities.
Expansion supports global demand and enhances contract manufacturing services.
news.summary:
Lupin expands Dabhasa unit, adding peptide and complex drug capabilities.
Expansion supports global demand and enhances contract manufacturing services.

news.title:
Lupin executed an NSE block trade of ~142,339 shares at Rs. 2300.2.
The trade totaled Rs. 32.74 Cr, showcasing significant investor activity.
news.summary:
Lupin executed an NSE block trade of ~142,339 shares at Rs. 2300.2.
The trade totaled Rs. 32.74 Cr, showcasing significant investor activity.

news.title:
Generic drugmakers like Ajanta Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin to launch semaglutide versions as Novo's patent expires.
Prices may drop 40-50%; healthcare facilities like Apollo, Fortis expand obesity services to meet rising demand.
news.summary:
Generic drugmakers like Ajanta Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin to launch semaglutide versions as Novo's patent expires.
Prices may drop 40-50%; healthcare facilities like Apollo, Fortis expand obesity services to meet rising demand.

news.title:
Citi reports muted corporate credit demand despite West Asia oil shock, reflecting stronger post-pandemic balance sheets.
Indian firms pursue outbound M&A deals like Tata Motors-Iveco and Lupin-VISUfarma, leveraging improved access to capital.
news.summary:
Citi reports muted corporate credit demand despite West Asia oil shock, reflecting stronger post-pandemic balance sheets.
Indian firms pursue outbound M&A deals like Tata Motors-Iveco and Lupin-VISUfarma, leveraging improved access to capital.

news.title:
Lupin focuses on complex generics, biosimilars for US market growth.
Founder Desh Bandhu Gupta named Lupin after a medicinal plant.
news.summary:
Lupin focuses on complex generics, biosimilars for US market growth.
Founder Desh Bandhu Gupta named Lupin after a medicinal plant.

news.title:
Lupin MD Nilesh Gupta highlights innovation focus, aiming for proprietary products growth in India.
Gupta sees 2023 as a pivot year, projecting substantial proprietary product impact in India.
news.summary:
Lupin MD Nilesh Gupta highlights innovation focus, aiming for proprietary products growth in India.
Gupta sees 2023 as a pivot year, projecting substantial proprietary product impact in India.

news.title:
Delaware Court upheld Astellas Pharma's Myrbetriq patents, blocking Ascent Pharma's generic until 2030.
This benefits Lupin and Zydus, who have already launched their generic versions.
news.summary:
Delaware Court upheld Astellas Pharma's Myrbetriq patents, blocking Ascent Pharma's generic until 2030.
This benefits Lupin and Zydus, who have already launched their generic versions.

news.title:
Lupin CFO highlights freight cost hikes due to West Asia conflict affecting pharma sector.
Lupin targets FY26 EBITDA margins of 26-27% and $1B US sales amid growth in India diabetes market.
news.summary:
Lupin CFO highlights freight cost hikes due to West Asia conflict affecting pharma sector.
Lupin targets FY26 EBITDA margins of 26-27% and $1B US sales amid growth in India diabetes market.

news.title:
Lupin indicates rising oil prices may increase solvent costs, affecting production.
Profitability could be impacted due to higher production expenses from oil price hikes.
news.summary:
Lupin indicates rising oil prices may increase solvent costs, affecting production.
Profitability could be impacted due to higher production expenses from oil price hikes.

news.title: Lupin reports cargo movement disruptions due to container delays at European and Middle Eastern ports.
news.summary: Lupin reports cargo movement disruptions due to container delays at European and Middle Eastern ports.

news.title:
Lupin falls 1.8% to Rs 2,301.25 after US FDA issues Form 483.
Ankleshwar facility inspection yields 2 observations; Lupin to respond promptly.
news.summary:
Lupin falls 1.8% to Rs 2,301.25 after US FDA issues Form 483.
Ankleshwar facility inspection yields 2 observations; Lupin to respond promptly.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Equal-Weight on Lupin with Rs 2,386 TP, citing manageable USFDA compliance risks.
Lupin is expected to deliver strong FY26 earnings growth, marking its second consecutive year of growth.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Equal-Weight on Lupin with Rs 2,386 TP, citing manageable USFDA compliance risks.
Lupin is expected to deliver strong FY26 earnings growth, marking its second consecutive year of growth.

news.title:
Lupin's Ankleshwar facility inspection by U.S. FDA concluded with Form 483, noting two observations.
Lupin commits to addressing observations and maintaining CGMP standards across facilities.
news.summary:
Lupin's Ankleshwar facility inspection by U.S. FDA concluded with Form 483, noting two observations.
Lupin commits to addressing observations and maintaining CGMP standards across facilities.

news.title:
Lupin shares hit 52-week high, gaining 11% YTD, outperforming Nifty Pharma's 1.2% rise.
Q3 revenue surged 28% YoY to ₹7,167 crore; US sales reached record $350M, aiding growth forecasts.
news.summary:
Lupin shares hit 52-week high, gaining 11% YTD, outperforming Nifty Pharma's 1.2% rise.
Q3 revenue surged 28% YoY to ₹7,167 crore; US sales reached record $350M, aiding growth forecasts.

news.title:
Lupin Ltd updates on Nanomi B.V.'s acquisition of VISUfarma B.V., Netherlands.
Transaction completion delayed to April 2026, pending closing condition fulfillment.
news.summary:
Lupin Ltd updates on Nanomi B.V.'s acquisition of VISUfarma B.V., Netherlands.
Transaction completion delayed to April 2026, pending closing condition fulfillment.

news.title:
Lupin received US FDA EIR for its Goa facility, classified as VAI.
VAI indicates no major violations but minor observations from Nov 10-21 inspection.
news.summary:
Lupin received US FDA EIR for its Goa facility, classified as VAI.
VAI indicates no major violations but minor observations from Nov 10-21 inspection.

news.title:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.
news.summary:
IRFC's OFS saw 95% subscription, raising concerns about government divestment appetite amid market uncertainties. Adani Ports repurchased $196.9M bonds, aiming to manage debt and reassure investors.
Lodha Developers acquired Malabar Hill land for Rs 2,800 crore project. Vikram Solar focuses on domestic growth despite US trade duties. Lupin faces GST probe; RIL boosts digital ecosystem with Facebook.

news.title:
Reliance Industries forms a strategic partnership with Facebook for REIL, altering its subsidiary structure and boosting tech focus.
Yes Bank flagged a $0.28M fraud, RVNL and Texmaco secured infra deals, and Lupin faced GST inspection; diverse corporate updates dominate.
news.summary:
Reliance Industries forms a strategic partnership with Facebook for REIL, altering its subsidiary structure and boosting tech focus.
Yes Bank flagged a $0.28M fraud, RVNL and Texmaco secured infra deals, and Lupin faced GST inspection; diverse corporate updates dominate.

news.title: GST Department inspected Lupin's Maharashtra office; cooperation ongoing.
news.summary: GST Department inspected Lupin's Maharashtra office; cooperation ongoing.
